heading: Claims not assignable or transferable; choice of remedies
label: 7385f Claims not assignable or transferable; choice of remedies
notes: Amendments2004—Subsec. (a). substituted “this subchapter” for “part B”.Pub. L. 108–375
amendments: Amendments2004—Subsec. (a). substituted “this subchapter” for “part B”.Pub. L. 108–375

children.heading: Claims not assignable or transferable
children.label: a Claims not assignable or transferable
children.text: No claim cognizable under this subchapter shall be assignable or transferable.

children.heading: Choice of remedies
children.label: b Choice of remedies
children.text: No individual may receive more than one payment of compensation under part B.
